tools.name: eslint_check
tools.description: ESLint code quality check (dry-run). Returns violations. Runs in Administration context.

paths.description: File paths or directories to lint. Defaults to current directory.

scope.description: Scope name from .mcp-js-tooling.json. Omit to use the configured default_scope. Pass "shopware" to force project-root behavior.

tools.name: eslint_fix
tools.description: ESLint auto-fix. Applies code style fixes in Administration context.

paths.description: File paths or directories to fix. Defaults to current directory.

scope.description: Scope name from .mcp-js-tooling.json. Omit to use the configured default_scope. Pass "shopware" to force project-root behavior.

tools.name: stylelint_check
tools.description: Stylelint SCSS/CSS check (dry-run). Returns violations in Administration context.

paths.description: File paths or glob patterns. Defaults to '**/*.scss'.

scope.description: Scope name from .mcp-js-tooling.json. Omit to use the configured default_scope. Pass "shopware" to force project-root behavior.

tools.name: stylelint_fix
tools.description: Stylelint auto-fix. Applies style fixes in Administration context.

paths.description: File paths or glob patterns. Defaults to '**/*.scss'.

scope.description: Scope name from .mcp-js-tooling.json. Omit to use the configured default_scope. Pass "shopware" to force project-root behavior.

tools.name: prettier_check
tools.description: Prettier format check (dry-run). Runs 'npm run format' which checks formatting with project config.

scope.description: Scope name from .mcp-js-tooling.json. Omit to use the configured default_scope. Pass "shopware" to force project-root behavior.

tools.name: prettier_fix
tools.description: Prettier auto-format. Runs 'npm run format:fix' which applies formatting with project config.

scope.description: Scope name from .mcp-js-tooling.json. Omit to use the configured default_scope. Pass "shopware" to force project-root behavior.

tools.name: jest_run
tools.description: Jest test runner for Administration. Returns test results.

testPathPatterns.description: Regex pattern for test file paths (--testPathPatterns)

scope.description: Scope name from .mcp-js-tooling.json. Omit to use the configured default_scope. Pass "shopware" to force project-root behavior.

tools.name: tsc_check
tools.description: TypeScript type checking. Runs 'npm run lint:types' which uses project tsconfig.

scope.description: Scope name from .mcp-js-tooling.json. Omit to use the configured default_scope. Pass "shopware" to force project-root behavior.

tools.name: lint_all
tools.description: Run ALL lint checks (TypeScript, ESLint, Stylelint, Prettier) in one command. Returns all violations.

scope.description: Scope name from .mcp-js-tooling.json. Omit to use the configured default_scope. Pass "shopware" to force project-root behavior.

tools.name: lint_twig
tools.description: ESLint check for Twig templates (.html.twig files). Validates Admin Vue component templates.

scope.description: Scope name from .mcp-js-tooling.json. Omit to use the configured default_scope. Pass "shopware" to force project-root behavior.

tools.name: unit_setup
tools.description: Regenerate component import resolver map. Run this when tests fail with import/module resolution errors.

scope.description: Scope name from .mcp-js-tooling.json. Omit to use the configured default_scope. Pass "shopware" to force project-root behavior.

tools.name: vite_build
tools.description: Vite build for Administration. Compiles Vue 3 assets.

scope.description: Scope name from .mcp-js-tooling.json. Omit to use the configured default_scope. Pass "shopware" to force project-root behavior.
